title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 94.200 - Board to provide for levy and collection of taxes — fix penalties
text:
94.200.  Board to provide for levy and collection of taxes — fix penalties. — The board of aldermen shall, from time to time, provide by ordinance for the levy and collection of all taxes, licenses, wharfage and other duties not herein enumerated, and for neglect or refusal to pay the same, shall fix such penalties as are now or may hereafter be authorized by law or ordinance.
(RSMo 1939 § 7151) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7001; 1919 § 8452; 1909 § 9354 
Indebtedness, city to provide for collection of annual tax to pay bonds, 95.380, 95.410 
Taxing authority, to levy taxes for general revenue purposes, 88.670
